[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Frickett''' was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]].

==Biography==
Frickett was an officer who seemed to have an inflated sense of self-importance which he passed on to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gage]]. Stationed on [[Maridun/Legends|Maridun]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he despised [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber's]] association with lower ranks and Sunber's ability to work alongside them.<ref name="Empire16" />

During the [[Battle of Maridun (0 ABY)|Battle of Maridun]], he foolishly ordered an attack on massed [[Amani/Legends|Amanin]] forces, not realizing that it was a trap. Frickett was killed along with most of his men, when they were outflanked by the better organized Amanin.<ref name="Empire17" />
